nodes.name: Schedule: Every Hour
nodes.notes: Runs every hour to check for upcoming appointments and no-shows. Reduce to every 30min for higher volume.

nodes.name: Read Appointments Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Appointments' with columns: Name | Email | Phone | Date | Time | Status | Reminder_24h_Sent | Reminder_2h_Sent | Survey_Sent | Notes

parameters.subject: =📅 Reminder: Your appointment tomorrow at {{ $json.time }}
parameters.message:
=

📅 Appointment Reminder

Hi {{ $json.name }}, just a friendly reminder about your upcoming appointment:

📅 Date: {{ $json.date }}

🕐 Time: {{ $json.time }}

📍 Location: REPLACE_WITH_LOCATION_OR_LINK

Need to reschedule? Please let us know at least 4 hours in advance.

Reschedule    Cancel

REPLACE_WITH_BUSINESS_NAME
=Hi {{ $json.name }}! Reminder: Your appointment is TODAY at {{ $json.time }}. Location: REPLACE_WITH_LOCATION. To reschedule: REPLACE_WITH_RESCHEDULE_URL — REPLACE_WITH_BUSINESS_NAME

nodes.name: Send 2h SMS Reminder
nodes.notes:
SETUP:
1. Sign up at twilio.com → get Account SID and Auth Token
2. Buy a phone number (from ~$1/month)
3. In n8n: Settings → Credentials → New → Twilio API
4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and REPLACE_WITH_TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER
5. SMS cost: ~$0.0075 per message

parameters.subject: =😔 We missed you — let's reschedule
parameters.message:
=

😔 We missed you, {{ $json.name }}

It looks like you weren't able to make your appointment today at {{ $json.time }}. No worries — life happens!

We'd love to find another time that works for you. Grab a slot below:

Pick a New Time →

Or simply reply to this email and we'll sort it out together.

REPLACE_WITH_BUSINESS_NAME

parameters.subject: =⭐ How was your appointment? (1 min survey)
parameters.message:
=

⭐ How did it go, {{ $json.name }}?

We hope your appointment today went smoothly! We'd love to hear your feedback — it takes less than 60 seconds.

Take the 60-Second Survey →

Your feedback helps us improve for every client. Thank you! 🙏

REPLACE_WITH_BUSINESS_NAME

nodes.name: Schedule: Daily No-Show Stats 11pm
nodes.notes: Runs every night at 11pm to calculate daily no-show rate.

nodes.name: Log No-Show Stats
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'No_Show_Stats' with columns: Date | Total_Appointments | Attended | No_Shows | No_Show_Rate_Pct | Recorded_At

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors from any node. Connect error outputs here.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

THIS WORKFLOW HAS 2 FLOWS:

FLOW A — Appointment Reminders + No-Show Recovery (runs hourly):
  24h before → Email reminder
  2h before  → SMS reminder (Twilio)
  30min after (if not 'Attended') → No-show reschedule email
  2h after   (if 'Attended') → Satisfaction survey email

FLOW B — Daily No-Show Stats (runs at 11pm):
  Calculates daily no-show rate → logs to 'No_Show_Stats' tab

GOOGLE SHEETS SETUP:
  Tab 'Appointments':
    Name | Email | Phone | Date | Time | Status | Reminder_24h_Sent | Reminder_2h_Sent | Survey_Sent | Notes
  
  - Date format: YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 2024-03-20)
  - Time format: HH:MM (e.g. 14:30)
  - Status values:
    * 'Scheduled' — appointment is upcoming
    * 'Attended'  — mark this after the appointment happens (manually or via other webhook)
    * 'No-Show'   — auto-set by this workflow
    * 'Cancelled' — to exclude from reminders
  - Reminder_24h_Sent, Reminder_2h_Sent, Survey_Sent: auto-filled by workflow

  Tab 'No_Show_Stats':
    Date | Total_Appointments | Attended | No_Shows | No_Show_Rate_Pct | Recorded_At

TWILIO SETUP:
  1. Create account at twilio.com (free trial includes $15 credit)
  2. Buy a phone number from the console (~$1/month)
  3. In n8n: Settings → Credentials → New → Twilio API
  4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID with your Account SID
  5. Replace REPLACE_WITH_TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER with your Twilio number (+1234567890 format)
  SMS cost: ~€0.007 per message

CUSTOMIZE:
  - REPLACE_WITH_SENDER_EMAIL — your sending email
  - REPLACE_WITH_LOCATION_OR_LINK — physical address or video call link
  - REPLACE_WITH_RESCHEDULE_URL — Calendly or booking link
  - REPLACE_WITH_CANCEL_URL — cancellation page or mailto: link
  - REPLACE_WITH_SURVEY_URL — Google Forms, Typeform, or Tally survey link
  - REPLACE_WITH_BUSINESS_NAME — your business name

TIP: Create a simple Typeform/Tally survey asking:
  1. How would you rate your experience? (1-5)
  2. What could we improve?
  3. Would you recommend us? (Yes/No)
